meaning: adj.(指权利等)不能让与的,不能剥夺的
examples: The idea of God-given, inalienable rights.
That we are endowed by our creator with certain inalienable rights.
We believe each of us is endowed by our Creator with certain inalienable rights and liberties.
Or will we assert our inalienable right to louse things up, each in our own individual way?
